Freya G-Link FlexV
Core Products · 03 / FlexV

Software-Defined
Radio. Reprogrammed
in the field.

FlexV is a defense-grade SDR platform that turns silicon into a moving target — adapting waveforms, modulations, and stacks faster than any adversary can characterize them.

Software-Defined Radio · 2025 → 2032

Spectrum is the terrain.

$32B
2025 SDR Market
$58B
2032 Projected
9.0%
CAGR
IV
Application Domains
Market Positioning

A moving target
by design.

FlexV sits at the convergence of cognitive radio, electronic warfare, and commercial cellular — a single programmable platform that adapts to the environment instead of being designed around a frozen standard.

  • Cognitive radio.Sense, decide, and reconfigure in real time.
  • Cross-domain.Military, commercial, IoT, and test on one stack.
  • Sovereign supply.Onshore fab, audited firmware, no foreign black boxes.
Application Scenarios

Four domains. One reprogrammable platform.

I

Military & Defense

Cognitive Radio · Tactical · Radar · SATCOM · NavWar
05 Apps
01

Cognitive Radio

Sense, decide, and adapt to the spectrum in real time.

02

Tactical

Battlefield mesh comms — jam-resilient and mobile.

03

Radar

Multi-mode radar reprogrammable per mission profile.

04

SATCOM

Multi-orbit ground terminals with software waveforms.

05

NavWar

GPS resilience and PNT under contested conditions.

II

Commercial Communications

5G/6G · NTN · Wi-Fi 7 · Private Networks
04 Apps
01

5G / 6G

Pre-standard waveform development on production silicon.

02

NTN

Non-terrestrial networks — direct-to-device satellite.

03

Wi-Fi 7

Reference implementation and conformance testing.

04

Private Networks

Enterprise-licensed cellular and industrial wireless.

III

IoT Infrastructure

Multi-Protocol Gateway · LPWAN Base Station
02 Apps
01

Multi-Protocol

One gateway speaks every IoT dialect — software-switched.

02

LPWAN Base

Wide-area base stations for industrial endpoints.

IV

Test & Measurement

Compliance · 5G Testing · Radar Sim · Channel Sounding
04 Apps
01

Compliance

Regulatory and conformance testing across regions.

02

5G Testing

End-to-end simulation of operator-grade networks.

03

Radar Sim

Threat emulation and electronic-warfare lab work.

04

Channel Sounding

Empirical propagation studies for next-gen standards.

Application Map

Built for the full RF stack.

From cognitive military radios to test-bench instrumentation, FlexV's reprogrammability turns one silicon investment into a portfolio that grows with every firmware drop.

One platform. Every spectrum.
The full portfolio

Three products. One connectivity thesis.

Freya. G-Link. FlexV. The silicon stack beneath the AI production era.
